selected: 3. 该兑现的 / 暂不掀的
omitted: 4. 日常/过渡承担什么任务

adjustments.rationale: Physical change delivered: shelter found (abandoned warehouse basement). 16-copper economic constraint maintained per plan §8.
Awakening aftermath shown through body-level symptoms (tinnitus, visual drift, 'door' perception metaphor). No explanation, no control, no enlightenment.
Class divide in disaster relief demonstrated through checkpoint scene: '西区不在救援范围内'. Soldiers refuse water. Lin Feng's modern-world recognition of the pattern ('屏幕外面' vs '屏幕里面').
Metal piece shows intermittent micro-heat matching Lin Feng's psychic state. Described phenomenologically only ('like a just-peeled egg', 'like breath rhythm'). No causal interpretation.
All three changes delivered: info (relief only covers east of main road), physical (shelter found), relation (survivor encounter - middle-aged woman shares water and information).
Basement sensory full coverage: odor (mold + earth + lime), temperature (cool + night chill), air quality ('sunken quiet' texture). audit_drift ch3 场景临场感 短板 fully addressed.

Two rhetorical devices deployed: parallel enumeration at chapter end ('十六枚铜币。一间破仓库。一份不知道该怎么处理的灵能。一个不知道能不能活下去的明天') and repetition pairing ('热起来的时候他知道自己还活着。凉下去的时候他知道自己还活着'). audit_drift 文笔质感 短板 addressed.

Girl (hand temperature simile echo) and Old Liu (hand reaching sky) remembrance embedded in same scene as awakening perception ('the door'). Grief and awakening coexist in the same space-time, not substituted. audit_drift 情感落地 短板 fully addressed.
Grief not replaced by action. Girl and Old Liu memories flow through Lin Feng's mind in the basement. No 'for the sake of the dead I must fight' rationalization. Pure silent remembrance.
Lin Feng stays in survival mode: checks his coins, counts breadcrumbs, doesn't volunteer help, retreats from checkpoint, doesn't confront the soldier. Pragmatic, afraid, no leadership gestures.
Only shelter resolved. 16 copper coins remain. No food procurement, no water source secured. Next chapter opens with the same economic pressure.
Lin Feng attempts to trigger psychic response ('spread hand, nothing happened'). First intentional attempt fails. Door does not open. Consistent with plan §8: first attempt in ch5 and likely fail.
